title: CarPlan All Seasons Ready Mixed Screen Wash, Removes Dirt, Grime, Prevents Freezing, 5 Litres
features: CONVENIENT ALL-SEASON CLEANING: CarPlan All Seasons Screenwash comes pre-mixed for year-round ease. Skip the hassle of dilution and pour it directly into your washer bottle.
STREAK-FREE FINISH: Enjoy a pristine windshield with our screenwash that swiftly rids dirt, grime, and pesky insect deposits for a streak-free view.
YEAR-ROUND VERSATILITY: This formula is your go-to for both summer and winter. It provides winter protection down to -4°C

WINTER-READY PROTECTION: This powerful formula isn't just for summer use. CarPlan's Screenwash is specially formulated to offer winter protection down to -4°C, ensuring your washer bottle contents won't freeze when used undiluted.
EFFORTLESS APPLICATION: No need for dilution or complex instructions. Simply pour the fluid directly into your washer bottle for hassle-free maintenance.
